entries.title: Live Market Dashboard
entries.description: Stock dashboard with real-time data and technical analysis.
entries.situation: The increasing complexity of financial markets necessitates tools for investors and analysts to monitor stock performance and identify trends. Existing tools suffer from cluttered interfaces, lack of real-time integration, and limited customization for technical indicators.
entries.delivered: Interactive price charts with customizable display options, real-time key financial metrics, comprehensive technical analysis (RSI, MACD), and a quick watchlist for monitoring selected stocks.

entries.title: Option Pricing Analytics
entries.description: Platform for options pricing, Greeks analysis, and risk management.
entries.situation: Options trading requires simultaneous understanding of multiple Greek metrics and pricing models. Existing platforms either overwhelm users with raw data or oversimplify the underlying mathematics, leaving a gap for professional-grade yet intuitive analytics.
entries.delivered: A comprehensive platform for Black-Scholes and binomial tree pricing, real-time Greeks visualization (Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega), interactive payoff diagrams, and risk management tools for portfolio hedging strategies.

entries.title: Stock Valuation Simulator
entries.description: Stock valuation tool that calculates the enterprise value of a company.
entries.situation: Accurate stock valuation is critical for investment decisions but typically requires expensive financial software or manual spreadsheet modeling. A gap exists for an accessible, interactive simulator applying industry-standard methodologies with real-time sensitivity analysis.
entries.delivered: A comprehensive valuation tool implementing DCF (Discounted Cash Flow), comparable company analysis, and precedent transaction methods. Features include dynamic sensitivity tables, scenario analysis, and automated valuation reports with visual dashboards.

entries.title: Portfolio Prediction Analyzer
entries.description: Portfolio analyzing tool that analyzes historical data to predict future performance.
entries.situation: Traditional portfolio management relies on historical averages and simple diversification models that fail to capture complex market dynamics and interdependencies. This leads to suboptimal asset allocation and underperformance, especially during volatile market conditions.
entries.delivered: An AI-driven portfolio optimization platform that uses deep learning models to predict future stock performance and optimize asset allocation. The system analyzes historical data, technical indicators, and market sentiment to recommend optimal portfolio configurations that maximize returns while managing risk.
